column2: Winnie the Pooh: Blood and Honey
column5:
15 minutes in

Watched it for a brain switch out of curiosity then decided I wasn't in the mood to finish it. I didn't completely fucking hate it but I wouldn't call it good either

10 minutes in

Not the worst thing ever (which I was expecting) even if still not that great. I only put it on out of curiosity while taking a break from homework but I'd honestly have kept going if I had less to do
